## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `cd app && ./mvnw -B -DskipTests clean package`
- [ ] `docker compose config`
- [ ] `docker compose up -d --build`
- [ ] Verified metrics, logs, and traces still flow end to end

## Notes

Call out any follow-up work, tradeoffs, or manual verification steps.
